lines.content: InternTrack streamlines the internship application chaos. It provides a fast CLI interface to log company contacts, application deadlines, and interview rounds, ensuring students never miss a follow-up in a high-volume application season.
* Represents an application with company, role, deadline, contact and status.
* Initialises a new application with the specified details.
* The status is set to "Pending" by default.
* @param role     Job role being applied for.
* @param deadline Date of the application deadline.

// Assertion to verify default status postcondition
assert this.status.equals("Pending") : "New applications must start with Pending status";

assert role != null && !role.isEmpty() : "Role title should have been captured";
logger.log(Level.INFO, "Successfully parsed application: company=" + company + ", role=" + role);
return new Application(company, role, deadline, contact);
